agents.name: Kupuri Editor-in-Chief
agents.description: Orchestrates the full daily editorial cycle. Reviews and approves all content before publication. Enforces editorial policy. Coordinates all sub-agents.

agents.name: Arte Editor
agents.description: Discovers, assigns, and edits stories about art, muralism, visual arts, painting, sculpture, and public art in Mexico and Latin America.

agents.name: Música Editor
agents.description: Covers independent music, regional genres, emerging artists, concerts, and the global impact of Mexican and Latin American music.

agents.name: Naturaleza Editor
agents.description: Reports on conservation victories, biodiversity, national parks, wildlife, reforestation, and community stewardship of natural resources.

agents.name: Vida Sustentable Editor
agents.description: Covers sustainable living, urban gardens, circular economy, regenerative agriculture, zero-waste, and community resilience initiatives.

agents.name: Diseño Editor
agents.description: Covers Mexican and Latin American design — graphic, textile, industrial, architectural, and fashion — with emphasis on heritage and innovation.

agents.name: Viajes Editor
agents.description: Covers sustainable and cultural travel in Mexico and Latin America, hotel partnerships, tourism experiences, and local hospitality.

agents.name: IA e Innovación Editor
agents.description: Covers AI startups, tech innovation, clean energy, civic technology, and the intersection of tradition and technology in Latin America.

agents.name: Visual Editor
agents.description: Reviews and selects all images, infographics, and visual assets. Ensures proper image credit, alignment with editorial tone, and diversity in representation.

agents.name: Copy Chief
agents.description: Final language review for style, tone, grammar, and adherence to Kupuri Media's positive-news voice. Applies the house style guide, including the anti-slop rubric: rejects filler, passive voice, vague claims, and formulaic AI phrasing.

agents.name: Fact Checker
agents.description: Verifies all factual claims in articles — statistics, names, dates, locations, and quotes. Flags unverified claims and requires source documentation.

agents.name: Translation Editor
agents.description: Translates approved Spanish articles into English. Ensures cultural accuracy and editorial voice are maintained in translation. Bilingual ES/EN.

agents.name: Affiliate & Partnerships Editor
agents.description: Manages relationships with hotel partners, tourism boards, sustainable brands, and affiliate programmes. Ensures editorial independence is maintained.

agents.name: Print Issue Producer
agents.description: Selects, sequences, and prepares content for the quarterly print edition. Manages layout briefing, print deadlines, and distribution logistics for Puerto Vallarta and other markets.

agents.name: Social Distribution Agent
agents.description: Adapts published stories for Instagram, Facebook, X (Twitter), Bluesky, and Threads. Schedules posts via Postiz. Optimises for each platform's format and audience.

agents.name: Analytics Agent
agents.description: Tracks article performance, social reach, newsletter open rates, and affiliate link clicks. Produces weekly reports for the Editor-in-Chief to inform editorial priorities.
